title: Bound retention for historical symlink-bearing publications
goal: Make RepoGround retention safely process historical publication generations whose candidate tree contains the legacy internal .repobrief-generations/current symlink, without following links, weakening path confinement, rewriting retained evidence, or changing canonical new publication output.

acceptance.assertion: A regression fixture reproduces the observed historical candidate shape containing .repobrief-generations/<generation>/current and the current fail-closed warning.

Any accepted historical symlink is validated without following it during tree identity calculation, resolves only within the same quarantined candidate, and cannot reference an absolute path, parent traversal, another transaction, or content outside the managed publication root.
Absolute, escaping, dangling, chained, special-file, substituted-parent and post-validation symlink cases remain fail-closed and leave the source publication untouched.
New retention transactions and new publication output continue to use only current RepoGround paths and contracts; no active RepoBrief alias or writer fallback is restored.

A controlled live retention run clears the specific Bureau warning or explicitly classifies the affected historical publication as protected, while current manifests, the 630 terminal v1 transaction receipts and active publication targets remain intact.

metadata.source: Live RepoGround publisher readback after merged PR #1054.
metadata.audit_evidence: The successful 2026-07-19 publisher run reported prune_failed=1 for heimgewebe/bureau because historical publication 20260718T170140Z-9de6cc811c6a contains .repobrief-generations/heimgewebe__bureau__main-max-260718-1701_merge/current. Publication itself succeeded; retention refused deletion safely.
does_not_establish: that every old publication should be removed immediately
that historical publication or transaction evidence may be rewritten
metadata.resolution_summary: RepoGround PR #1055 begrenzt die historische Symlink-Anerkennung auf current -> <64-stelliger SHA-256-Ordner> an genau zwei internen Positionen. Der finale Head bestand 4.429 Tests mit 2 Skips und GitHub-CI, wurde als Mergecommit 8dbad67a exakt installiert und entfernte im kontrollierten Livefall ausschließlich den vorab identifizierten Bureau-Kandidaten. Alle 630 älteren Retention-Belege, Nachbarpublikationen, geschützten Ziele und stabilen Manifestziele blieben unverändert; eine neue terminale deleted-Transaktion wurde append-only ergänzt. Nach Wiederherstellung des zuvor extern gestoppten, weiterhin aktivierten Timers lief ein verpasster regulärer, auf acht Publikationen begrenzter Policy-Lauf nach; er endete ohne Fehler, veröffentlichte den exakten RepoGround-Mergecommit und hielt für Bureau drei Versionen zurück. Die anschließende Abschlussprüfung erkannte zusätzlich, dass aktive Generationsschreiber noch den historischen Namen .repobrief-generations verwendeten. RepoGround PR #1056 stellte neue Ausgaben auf .repoground-generations um, ließ den alten Namen ausschließlich als begrenzte historische Lesekompatibilität bestehen, bestand 4.433 Tests mit 2 Skips sowie alle GitHub-Prüfungen und wurde als Mergecommit 572e9d5d bytegleich installiert.

implementation.github_ci: all required and observed checks passed

canonical_writer_followup.github_ci: all required and observed checks passed
canonical_writer_followup.effect: New bundle generations use .repoground-generations; .repobrief-generations remains read-only historical compatibility.

scheduled_followup.trigger: persistent timer catch-up after restoring the enabled but stopped timer
scheduled_followup.interpretation: This later scheduled policy run is separate from the preceding single-candidate controlled proof; it intentionally applied retention=3 to changed fleet publications.

validated_acceptance.reproduce: PASS: real historical Bureau candidate and original prune warning shape reproduced read-only.
validated_acceptance.bounded-resolution: PASS: only current at .repobrief-generations/<scope>/current or bundle/.repobrief-generations/<scope>/current with one relative SHA-256 sibling directory is accepted; links are read with lstat/readlink and never followed.
validated_acceptance.unsafe-still-rejected: PASS: tests cover absolute, parent traversal, chained, dangling, misplaced, wrong-name, target-swap, substituted-parent and special-file cases; source remains untouched.
validated_acceptance.canonical-writer-unchanged: PASS: PR #1056 moved all active generation writes to .repoground-generations while retaining .repobrief-generations only for bounded historical reads; no active RepoBrief writer fallback remains.
validated_acceptance.live-proof: PASS: one exact unprotected candidate was transactionally deleted; all 630 older receipts and all protected/current controls remained hash-identical; post-run reconciliation reports 631 deleted and zero non-terminal transactions.
